name: Edwin

conquest.name: Shrapnel Load
conquest.description: Edwin throws out a homemade explosive, dealing AOE damage to the target and nearby enemies.

conquest.name: Detonate
conquest.description: Edwin's explosives have a 20% chance of stunning targets.

expedition.name: Demolitions Expert
expedition.description: Edwin's knowledge of minerals increases the Town's Quarry Output.

expedition.name: Stone Mining
expedition.description: Edwin's expert quarrying techniques increase his Stone Mining Speed in the Wilderness.

exclusive_gear_note: Rare heroes do not have exclusive gear.

f2p_investment.reasoning: Rare-tier starter hero, universally accessible to all players.

shard_cost_to_star_up.note: Rare heroes have significantly lower shard requirements than Legendary/Mythic

lore_background.title: The Demolitions Expert
lore_background.derived_character_themes: Cavalry explosives specialist and stone gathering expert. Skill flavor text references "homemade explosives" and "expert quarrying techniques" suggesting a pragmatic miner-soldier.
lore_background.source_note: No narrative backstory published on consulted sources.

deep_analysis: Edwin is a Rare (R-grade) cavalry gathering hero in Kingshot — used on farm accounts for stone production. His Expedition skills directly boost Town Quarry Output (+25%) and Wilderness Stone Gathering Speed (+25%), making him essential for players who maintain gathering marches. His Conquest kit (Shrapnel Load AOE, Detonate stun chance) is functional but his primary value is economic. Universally F2P-accessible through Hero Recruitment, Intel Missions, and Conquest Battles.

effect_op_codes.description: Rare-tier gathering hero — no rally joiner effect_op code (not a combat hero)
effect_op_codes.source: kingshothandbook.com (rare tier heroes not in effect_op stacking system)

named_pairs.note: Edwin specializes stone, Diana provides universal stamina reduction

best_partners.source: kingshothandbook.com effect_op stacking math + community lineup guides

order: Max Demolitions Expert FIRST (Expedition — +25% Quarry Output)
Then Stone Mining (+25% Stone Gathering Speed in Wilderness)
Conquest (Shrapnel Load, Detonate) is filler — Edwin is a gatherer not combatant

gear_recommendations.reasoning: Standard cavalry archetype at rare tier. Derived from community gear build templates (allclash.com Zoe guide as canonical base for infantry, confirmed by community consensus across allclash, heaven-guardian, kingshothandbook build guides).
sources: allclash.com Zoe build guide (canonical infantry template)

counters.reason: No public source documents explicit hero-vs-hero counter matchups for Kingshot. Community discussions reference troop-type rock-paper-scissors (Infantry > Cavalry > Archer > Infantry) and formation-based counters but not specific hero counters. Check Discord/Reddit for player-tested matchups.
